name: meeting-copilot
description: AI meeting copilot - Zoom companion panel + Python engine

scripts.dev: concurrently --names panel,engine --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:panel" "npm run dev:engine"
scripts.test: npm run test:panel && npm run test:engine
scripts.lint:panel: cd panel && npx biome check src/
scripts.lint: npm run lint:panel && npm run lint:engine
